title: Methanol Dilution for LCMS Analysis
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol either perfors single, or double dilution of sample with methanol and standard for LCMS analysis. For more details, please see below.
steps_raw: This protocol either perfors single, or double dilution of sample with methanol and standard for LCMS analysis. For more details, please see below.
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: Waters 48 Tube Rack with ThermoFisher 0.3 mL #700011047
Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with Generic 2 mL Screwcap
Opentrons 10 Tube Rack with Falcon 4x50 mL, 6x15 mL Conical
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
Opentrons P1000 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
